groups.surface: GitHub-hosted runner images and OS facts
groups.rationale: Current main compares emitted runner facts against the checked-in baseline but does not yet evaluate authoritative GitHub-hosted runner image metadata or advisories.
groups.managed_issue_behavior: Future actionable source-backed findings must reuse the existing managed issue title.

groups.surface: Android Java, Gradle, and emulator host facts
groups.rationale: Current main captures Android Java, Gradle, and emulator runtime facts from smoke evidence only; it does not yet evaluate authoritative source feeds for those host surfaces.
groups.managed_issue_behavior: Future actionable source-backed findings must reuse the existing managed issue title.
groups.candidate_source: Authoritative Java and Gradle release metadata plus Android emulator system-image/runtime metadata

groups.surface: iOS Xcode and simulator runtime host facts
groups.rationale: Current main records Xcode and simulator-runtime evidence but does not yet evaluate Apple source data for those surfaces.
groups.managed_issue_behavior: Future actionable source-backed findings must reuse the existing managed issue title.
groups.candidate_source: Apple Xcode and simulator runtime release metadata
